metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5277
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 5: "The adaptor protein Fe65 (APBB1) is present in Schaffer collaterals/CA1 dendritic spine hippocampal synapses where it colocalizes with P2X2 subunits. Immunogold localization of Fe65 using Fe65-32 (A-C) or Fe65-35 (D-G) antibodies. Gold particles were found both at the pre- and postsynaptic specialization of excitatory hippocampal synapses.". Experimental description: M&M: "Light and Electron Microscopy
Four postnatal day 35 Sprague-Dawley rats were transcardially perfused. "

antibody:
"Polyclonal antibodies were raised in rabbits using the GST fusion protein containing amino acids 197-255 or amino acids 40-100 of Fe65 (antibodies Fe65-32 or -35, respectively)."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
